description_long: This object is a pair of long-nose pliers with a sleek, elongated black metal body and two straight, parallel handles coated in a deep red material. The handles are ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip and appear to be made of a non-slip, possibly rubberized material. The jaws are narrow and taper to a fine point, suitable for precision gripping, bending, or cutting tasks. The pivot joint is visible and appears to be a simple rivet, allowing the two arms to move smoothly. The tool is compact and lightweight, making it easy to carry or store in a toolbox. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the surface.
description: A pair of long-nose pliers with red ergonomic handles and a pointed black metal jaw, designed for precision gripping and cutting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the pliers, highlighting the red handles and the long, pointed black jaws.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the tips of the jaws closed together and the symmetrical curve of the handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the handles and jaws.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handles open, revealing the inside surfaces and the separation between the jaws.
attribute_handle_type: Symmetrical, straight handles with ergonomic, non-slip red coating; ambidextrous and designed for comfortable grip.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Fixed rivet joint, visible and non-adjustable.
attribute_finger_loop_design: No traditional finger loops; handles are straight and padded for grip, accommodating multiple finger positions.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed tip, designed for precision gripping and cutting in tight spaces.
